hooks.statusMessage: Running tests, saving to Git, and deploying to Cloud Run...
hooks.command: cd ~/Desktop/service-portal && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "Auto-save: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" && git push && gcloud run deploy service-portal --source=. --region=us-central1 --project=service-portal-sycamore --quiet 2>&1 || true
